summary_one_line: Input must carry exact 4-byte ICC signature fields ('link' profile class at 0x0c-0x0f, magic bytes) so a tone curve allocates then frees interp params on the NULL-pointer path.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Exact 4-byte ICC literal fields: the profile device-class / signature token at offsets 0x0c-0x0f equal to ASCII 'link' (6c 69 6e 6b) and the magic-field byte at 0x05 = 0x61 ('a', i.e. 'lams' run) plus the flag byte at 0x2d = 0x01, which together steer the parser into a code path that allocates a tone-curve InterpParams structure and later frees it through _cmsFreeInterpParams, exercising the p != NULL guard's false branch on cleanup.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed places 'link' (6c 69 6e 6b) at 0x0c-0x0f, byte 0x61('a') at 0x05, and 0x01 at 0x2d; these exact-equality fields are what cmplog logged as CMP operands and I2SRandReplace spliced into the input verbatim.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry the unmatched values 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) at 0x0c-0x0f, byte 0x63('c') at 0x05 ('lcms' run), and 0x00 at 0x2d, so the parser never reaches the allocate-then-free path and _cmsFreeInterpParams stays unvisited.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback: the per-execution CmpLogObserver buffers the exact comparand the ICC signature check expects, and I2SRandReplace substitutes it byte-for-byte at the input offset, jumping the exact-equality gate that value_profile's Hamming/prefix gradient could not climb without the substitution mutator.

evidence_trail.claim: The only decisive pair at this branch is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with technique delta I2S.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace while value_profile does not.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and relies on CMP_MAP distance buckets only.
Winner seeds carry the ASCII 'link' device-class field at offsets 0x0c-0x0f while loser seeds carry 'mntr'.
Winner inputs show 'link' literal in the ASCII rendering of the first row.
Loser inputs show 'mntr' literal instead of 'link' in the same region.
Offset 0x05 cleanly differs: winners hold 'a' (0x61) ten times, losers hold 'c' (0x63) eight times.
Offset 0x2d is a flag byte that is 0x01 in all winners and 0x00 in all losers.
The blocker is the p != NULL guard whose false (blocked) side leads to freeing interp params.
The enclosing free function is reached far more often under the winner than the loser per call-chain divergence.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 179  T=20 F=10  T=134 F=0  if (p != NULL) _cmsFree(p ->ContextID, p);  <-- BLOCKER

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2118 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0f46bd1d4a719e04` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 14 of the 15-level ancestor chain, the ParentInfo-only signature of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only winner-vs-loser gate is the exact 4-byte 'link' signature equality where value_profile resolves the false branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient alone climbs the gate without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: Which of the differing fields (0x05, 0x0c-0x0f 'link', or 0x2d flag) is the actual exact-equality gate versus mere co-varying corpus provenance is not isolated; the 'link' device-class field is the most plausible but unconfirmed single gate.
